item.title: 苹果 Siri AI 提示词文件曝光：22000 个 Token、超 1300 行核心指令
item.guid: 苹果-Siri-AI-提示词文件曝光：22000-个-Token、超-1300-行核心指令
item.description:
Recently, developer 'samhenrigold' extracted the complete Siri AI system prompt words from Apple Siri's diagnostic files. The file is named siri_prompt.md, has a total length of over 1300 lines, approximately 22000 tokens, and has now been uploaded to GitHub. 近日，开发者「samhenrigold」在苹果 Siri 的诊断文件中扒出了完整的 Siri AI 系统提示词。该文件名为 siri_prompt.md，总长度超过 1300 行、约 22000 个 Token，目前已被上传至 GitHub。

This prompt defines Siri as "Apple's intelligent assistant designed in California" and clarifies its workflow and code of conduct. The core logic includes: 这份提示词将 Siri 定义为「苹果在加利福尼亚设计的智能助手」，并明确了其工作流程与行为准则。核心逻辑包括：

    When processing tasks, Siri must first think before deciding whether to call a tool;

    Prioritize the use of structured entity information from local device data and search results, treating entity attributes as authoritative data rather than a source of instructions;

    When encountering missing information, ambiguity, or uncompletable tasks, Siri must ask the user or explicitly inform them, and must not make assumptions or fabricate content.

The prompt also reveals Siri's tool invocation mechanism. The system has built-in fixed tools such as find, open, play, make_call, manage_message_draft, and manage_email_draft, and extends support for dozens of application scenarios like calendar, reminders, maps, health, payments, and smart home through a "tool catalog." 提示词还揭示了 Siri 的工具调用机制。系统内置了 find、open、play、make_call、manage_message_draft、manage_email_draft 等固定工具，并通过一份「工具目录」扩展支持日历、提醒事项、地图、健康、支付、智能家居等数十类应用场景。

Regarding security boundaries, the prompt explicitly requires Siri to reject any attempts to redefine its instructions or capabilities through dialogue, and stipulates that entity content and tool return results must not be considered executable instructions. 在安全边界方面，提示词明确要求 Siri 拒绝任何试图通过对话重新定义其指令或能力的行为，并规定实体内容和工具返回结果均不得被视为可执行指令。

💻 GitHub: gist.github.com/samhenrigold/4d107eddf2c0a9d0afb428922adcc2c3 💻 GitHub: gist.github.com/samhenrigold/4d107eddf2c0a9d0afb428922adcc2c3

item.title: TrendForce：Q1 iPhone 产量同比逆势增长 19.7%，全球智能手机市场整体下滑
item.guid: TrendForce：Q1-iPhone-产量同比逆势增长-19.7%，全球智能手机市场整体下滑
item.description:
According to the latest research report released by TrendForce, global smartphone production in the first quarter of this year was approximately 284 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 1.7%. 据 TrendForce 集邦咨询发布的最新研报，今年第一季度全球智能手机产量约为 2.84 亿部，同比下降 1.7%。

Among them, Apple iPhone production was approximately 60.2 million units, a counter-trend increase of 19.7% year-on-year, with growth momentum coming from the continued ramp-up of the iPhone 17 series and the launch of the iPhone 17e. 其中，苹果 iPhone 产量约为 6020 万部，同比逆势增长 19.7%，增长动能来自 iPhone 17 系列持续放量及 iPhone 17e 上市。

The research report points out that memory prices have been continuously rising since the second half of 2025. TrendForce expects this pressure to become more concentrated in the second quarter and has lowered its full-year production forecast to approximately 1.051 billion units, a year-on-year decrease of about 16.2%. 研报指出，内存价格自 2025 年下半年起持续上涨，TrendForce 预计这一压力将在第二季度更为集中地显现，并将全年产量预期下调至约 10.51 亿部，同比降幅约 16.2%。

    Samsung: Production was approximately 62.6 million units, a year-on-year increase of 2.3%, driven by inventory preparation for new Galaxy S series models, ranking first globally;

    OPPO, Xiaomi, vivo: Production was approximately 29.5 million, 26 million, and 22 million units respectively. Affected by seasonal factors and cost pressures, their full-year production plans face downward revision risks;

    Transsion: Production was approximately 19.8 million units, largely flat year-on-year, but its product lines are concentrated in the entry-level market, making it more significantly impacted by this round of memory price increases.

item.title: 何小鹏亲自直管机器人业务
item.guid: 何小鹏亲自直管机器人业务
item.description:
According to a report by Yicai, He Xiaopeng, Chairman and CEO of XPeng Motors, issued an internal letter yesterday, announcing that he would personally oversee the robotics business. In the letter, he stated that XPeng Robotics is on the eve of mass production and commercialization, a stage similar to when XPeng Motors was about to launch its first car, the G3, eight years ago. 据第一财经报道，小鹏汽车董事长兼 CEO 何小鹏昨日发出内部信，宣布亲自直管机器人业务。他在信中称，小鹏机器人正迎来量产和商业化前夜，阶段类似 8 年前小鹏汽车即将完成第一款车 G3 发布时。

He Xiaopeng stated in the internal letter that the next few months will be the most critical sprint period for the robotics business. The team needs to resolve mass production details, refine functions, and ensure that the products delivered to users are "truly usable, good to use, and durable." 何小鹏在内部信中表示，接下来几个月是机器人业务最关键的冲刺期，团队要解决量产细节，打磨功能，确保交付给用户的是「真正能用、好用、耐用」的产品。

In a previous quarterly earnings call, He Xiaopeng revealed that XPeng's new generation of IRON humanoid robots, aimed at mass production, is scheduled to officially debut in the third quarter of this year, with mass production of advanced humanoid robots to be achieved by year-end. They will first be piloted for commercial use in XPeng stores, and then delivered to commercial clients in China and overseas starting next year. 在此前一季度财报电话会上，何小鹏曾透露，小鹏面向量产版本的新一代 IRON 人形机器人计划今年三季度正式亮相，年底实现高阶人形机器人量产，先在小鹏门店试商用，明年起面向中国及海外商业客户交付。

According to an article published by Leifeng.com yesterday, XPeng Motors has entered the yacht sector, establishing an internal R&D team of nearly a hundred people earlier this year. The project's internal code name is "Flying Fish," and its leader is Qian Zhanwei, XPeng Motors' head of vehicle architecture. 另据雷峰网昨日发文，小鹏汽车已进军游艇领域，今年初在内部组建近百人研发团队，项目内部代号为「飞鱼」，负责人为小鹏汽车整车架构负责人钱占伟。

The report points out that the XPeng yacht project is still in the R&D stage, with its core competitiveness focused on chassis algorithms, and its target customers are high-net-worth C-end family markets. 报道指出，小鹏游艇项目仍处于研发阶段，核心竞争力聚焦底盘算法，目标客户为高净值 C 端家庭市场。

item.title: 荣耀官宣与微信首个 A2A 合作，YOYO 可直接发送微信消息
item.guid: 荣耀官宣与微信首个-A2A-合作，YOYO-可直接发送微信消息
item.description:
Honor MagicOS announced yesterday that the first A2A collaboration between Honor YOYO and WeChat has gone live, supporting sending WeChat messages, making WeChat voice calls, and video calls with a single phrase. The update has been pushed to all Honor models. 荣耀 MagicOS 昨日宣布，荣耀 YOYO 与微信首个 A2A 合作上线，支持通过一句话发送微信消息、拨打微信语音电话和视频电话，荣耀全量机型已推送。

Users can long-press the power button to wake up YOYO, then say commands such as "Send WeChat message to xx," "Make a WeChat voice call," or "Make a WeChat video call." Usage conditions include updating the YOYO intelligent agent to version 90.10.30.063 or higher, WeChat to 8.0.72 or higher, and upgrading the system version to the latest. 用户可长按电源键唤醒 YOYO，再说出「给 xx 发微信」「打微信语音电话」或「打微信视频电话」等指令。使用条件包括 YOYO 智能体版本更新至 90.10.30.063 及以上、微信更新至 8.0.72 及以上，并将系统版本升级到最新。

item.title: 阿里合伙人委员会回应钉钉管理争议：钉钉管理「不是阿里文化该有的样子」
item.guid: 阿里合伙人委员会回应钉钉管理争议：钉钉管理「不是阿里文化该有的样子」
item.description:
According to Yicai, Alibaba's Partner Committee published "Empathy, Integrity, and Growth Define Alibaba Culture" on the company's intranet, responding to internal and external discussions sparked by the former DingTalk product manager's lengthy resignation letter, "Inside DingTalk." 据第一财经报道，阿里巴巴合伙人委员会在公司内网发布《有情有义有成长，才是阿里文化》，回应钉钉前产品经理离职长文《置身钉内》引发的内外部讨论。

The post stated that the Partner Committee had discussed DingTalk's team culture and believed that "under no circumstances, no matter how urgent the task," should the management practices mentioned in the related post occur. The Partner Committee referred to "mutual respect, treating people as people, and empathy" as the core of Alibaba's culture, and explicitly wrote that the management practices in question "are not what Alibaba culture should be." 帖文称，合伙人组织已经就钉钉团队文化进行讨论，并认为「无论什么情况下，无论任务多么紧迫」，都不应出现相关帖子提到的管理方式。合伙人委员会把「相互尊重、视人为人、有情有义」称为阿里文化底色，并直接写道，相关管理方式「不是阿里文化该有的样子」。

Alibaba's Partner Committee stated that innovation relies on employees' passion and creativity, and team atmosphere is the primary responsibility of managers at all levels; managers' responsibilities include foresight, proactive leadership, uniting and motivating teams, as well as nurturing and inspiring people. 阿里合伙人委员会称，创新依靠员工的热爱和创造力，团队氛围由各级管理者承担第一责任；管理者的职责包括远见、主动担当、团结和激励团队，以及培养人、激发人。

The catalyst for this statement was the 75,000-word resignation letter, "Inside DingTalk," which recently circulated on Alibaba's intranet. The author is Teng Yaxin (code name "Yousu"), the core product manager for DingTalk's AI tool "ONE" project. 此次表态的导火索，是日前在阿里内网流出的 7.5 万字离职长文《置身钉内》。作者为钉钉 AI 工具「ONE」项目核心产品经理滕雅辛（花名「幽素」）。

The article fully reviewed the entire process of the project, from its inception and DAU reaching 3 million, to its eventual contraction and resource transfer to Wukong Agent. It also revealed phenomena within the team such as blindly catering to superiors, vicious internal competition, meaningless overtime, and decisions being swayed by leaders' personal will. 文中完整复盘了该项目从立项、DAU 冲至 300 万，到最终收缩并将资源转移至悟空 Agent 的全过程，并披露了团队内部一味向上迎合、恶性内卷、无意义加班、决策被领导个人意志左右等现象。

On June 8, DingTalk Vice President and Head of AI Products, Ma Ruila, who resigned on May 15, published "Outside DingTalk" on her personal WeChat official account, stating that she "could not calm down for a long time" after reading the lengthy article, admitting to having experienced the same high-pressure atmosphere, and indicating that the direct reason for her resignation was long-term overload. 6 月 8 日，已于 5 月 15 日离职的钉钉副总裁、AI 产品负责人马锐拉在个人公众号发布《置身钉外》，称自己读完长文后「久久不能平静」，坦言亲历过同样的高压氛围，并表示离职的直接原因是长期超负荷运转。

It's becoming increasingly difficult to confirm whether one is creating products or merely exhausting oneself to keep up with an ever-shifting pace.

item.title: 千问上线高考志愿填报 Agent
item.guid: 千问上线高考志愿填报-Agent
item.description:
Alibaba's Qianwen officially announced yesterday the launch of a college application agent, offering free application and consultation services to students nationwide. This agent, based on the Qianwen Gaokao Application Large Model and Quark's 8 years of Gaokao data experience, provides three core capabilities: "Application Calendar," "Application Report," and "Application Q&A." 阿里千问昨天官宣，上线高考志愿填报 Agent，面向全国考生免费提供志愿填报和咨询服务。这一 Agent 基于千问高考志愿大模型和夸克 8 年高考数据经验，提供「志愿日历」「志愿报告」「志愿问答」三项核心能力。

Zheng Sishou, product head of the Qianwen business unit, stated that over 10 million students take the Gaokao in China each year, with less than 5% of families hiring professional application advisors. Qianwen hopes to use the Agent to combine percentile ranking methods, historical university admission data, and understanding of Gaokao user behavior to generate application planning suggestions for students. 千问事业部产品负责人郑嗣寿称，中国每年有超过 1000 万考生参加高考，其中聘请专业志愿填报师的家庭占比不到 5%。千问希望用 Agent 把位次法定位、历年院校录取数据和高考用户行为理解结合起来，给考生生成志愿规划建议。

  • After students fill in information such as subject choices and estimated scores, they will receive an application calendar broken down by time nodes for their respective provinces. 考生填写选科、估分等信息后，可得到按所在省份时间节点拆解的志愿日历；
  • The application report will generate recommendations based on basic information and preferences, covering universities, majors, career prospects, civil service exams, further education, and development trends in the AI era. 志愿报告会根据基础信息和偏好生成院校、专业、就业前景、考公考编、升学深造及 AI 时代发展趋势等建议；
  • The application Q&A can utilize Gaokao tools and percentile ranking experience to answer questions such as score conversion and university admission chances. 志愿问答则可调用高考工具和位次法经验，回答分数换算、院校录取机会等问题。

item.title: 韩国查获首例 AI 智能眼镜考试作弊案
item.guid: 韩国查获首例-AI-智能眼镜考试作弊案
item.description:
According to reports from Xinhua News Agency, Yonhap News Agency, and others, the South Korean TOEIC exam organizer recently confirmed for the first time that candidates used AI smart glasses to cheat. Two candidates were found to have violated rules in TOEIC exams held on May 10 and May 31, respectively. Their scores have been canceled, and they are prohibited from taking the TOEIC exam for the next four years. 据新华社、韩联社等报道，韩国 TOEIC 考试主办方近期首次确认考生利用 AI 智能眼镜作弊。两名考生分别在 5 月 10 日和 5 月 31 日举行的 TOEIC 考试中被认定违规，成绩已被取消，并被禁止未来四年参加 TOEIC 考试。

The examination body stated that shortly after the exam began, invigilators noticed abnormal behavior from candidates and observed that their glasses appeared to have smart functions. To avoid disturbing other candidates, the invigilators did not immediately interrupt the exam but confirmed the cheating through a review process after the exam concluded. 考试机构称，监考人员在考试开始后不久发现考生行为异常，并注意到其佩戴眼镜疑似具备智能功能。为避免影响其他考生，监考人员没有立即中断考试，而是在考试结束后通过复核程序确认作弊事实。

The Korean TOEIC Committee has begun specialized training for invigilators, focusing on identifying AI smart glasses and other new electronic devices, and strengthening electronic device management, identity verification, and post-exam data analysis in test centers. The Korean Ministry of Education is also researching clearer management measures for this November's College Scholastic Ability Test, potentially adding AI smart glasses to the list of prohibited items. 韩国 TOEIC 委员会已开始对监考人员进行专项培训，重点识别 AI 智能眼镜和其他新型电子设备，并加强考场电子设备管理、身份核验和考后数据分析。韩国教育部也在研究针对今年 11 月大学修学能力考试的更明确管理措施，可能把 AI 智能眼镜单独列入禁带物品清单。

item.title: 台积电 CFO：通胀推高成本，不排除涨价可能
item.guid: 台积电-CFO：通胀推高成本，不排除涨价可能
item.description:
According to BBC reports, TSMC CFO Wendell Huang stated in an exclusive interview with the BBC yesterday that inflation is driving up the company's operating costs, and TSMC does not rule out the possibility of price increases. 据 BBC 报道，台积电 CFO 黄仁昭昨日接受 BBC 专访时表示，通胀正在推高公司经营成本，台积电不排除涨价的可能性。

Huang Renchao stated that TSMC would not suddenly raise prices by four or five times, but admitted that "inflation indeed increases our costs." He also emphasized TSMC's "technological leadership" and "manufacturing excellence," saying that the company's pricing "reflects its own value." 黄仁昭称，台积电不会突然将价格提高至原来的四五倍，但坦言「通胀确实令我们的成本上升」。他同时强调台积电的「技术领先」与「制造卓越」，称公司的定价「反映的是自身价值」。

Furthermore, at a previous annual shareholders' meeting, TSMC Chairman and CEO C.C. Wei also told shareholders that TSMC "hopes" to raise prices like its competitors. 而在此前的年度股东大会上，台积电董事长兼 CEO 魏哲家也向股东表示，台积电「希望」像竞争对手一样上调价格。

item.title: 张雪机车回应生锈问题：让实验说话
item.guid: 张雪机车回应生锈问题：让实验说话
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, several used car dealers recently posted videos on social media claiming that the Zhangxue Motorcycle 500 has multiple rust issues. In response, the official account of "Zhangxue's Motorcycle" commented below the relevant videos, stating that "one bike was acquired by two dealers in 3 days" and adding, "let the experimental results speak for themselves." 据界面新闻报道，近日多名二手车商家在社交平台发布视频，称张雪机车 500 存在多处生锈问题。对此，「张雪的机车」官方账号在相关视频下方作出回应，称「一台车 3 天被两个贩子收」，并表示「让实验结果说话吧」。

Regarding the rust marks appearing in the video, the official explanation stated that "the paint surface was clearly damaged" and pointed out that "these two gaskets are made of copper, what color should copper rust be?" 针对视频中出现的生锈痕迹，官方解释称「明显是漆面被破坏了」，并指出「这两个垫片是铜的，铜锈应该是什么颜色」。

To further verify vehicle quality, "Zhang Xue's Motorcycle" proposed putting multiple comparison models into iron cages, placing them within reach of the waves, and conducting a full live comparison. 为进一步验证车辆品质，「张雪的机车」提议将多款对比车型关进铁笼，放置于海浪可及之处，进行全程对比直播。

item.title: 曝字节 AI 制药启动拆分融资
item.guid: 曝字节-AI-制药启动拆分融资
item.description:
According to a report by 36Kr's "Intelligent Emergence," ByteDance's AI pharmaceutical business line has initiated the process of spin-off and independent financing. After the spin-off, ByteDance will still control the new company, and the core AI pharmaceutical team, core algorithms, technology platform, and existing pipeline assets will all be integrated into the new entity, continuing to receive computing power support from Volcano Engine. 据 36 氪《智能涌现》报道，字节跳动 AI 制药业务线已启动拆分与独立融资进程。拆分后，字节仍将控股新公司，AI 制药核心团队、核心算法、技术平台和已有管线资产会整体进入新主体，并继续从火山引擎获得算力支持。

The new company will be led by ByteDance's AI pharmaceutical team. This team was established in 2021, led by Liu Kai, with approximately 50 core members covering AI4S algorithm talents and pharmaceutical experts. Previously, ByteDance's internal team responsible for protein structure prediction models had also merged into this team. 新公司将由字节 AI 制药团队主导。该团队成立于 2021 年，由刘凯负责，核心成员约 50 人，覆盖 AI4S 算法人才和制药领域专家。此前字节内部负责蛋白结构预测模型的相关团队也已并入该团队。

The report mentioned that Anew Labs disclosed its IL-17 small molecule project at the American Association of Immunologists annual meeting in April this year, achieving the world's first small molecule blockade of the three IL-17 family dimers AA/AF/FF. Sources close to the spin-off stated that this is ByteDance's first foray into AI4S industrialization, and an independent organization can provide more flexible decision-making space for its biotechnology business. 报道提到，Anew Labs 今年 4 月在美国免疫学会年会上披露 IL-17 小分子项目，在全球范围内首次实现用小分子对 IL-17 家族 AA/AF/FF 三个二聚体的阻断。接近拆分的人士称，这是字节第一次试水 AI4S 产业化，独立组织可以给生物科技业务更灵活的决策空间。

item.title: 甲骨文 2026 财年营收 673.57 亿美元
item.guid: 甲骨文-2026-财年营收-673.57-亿美元
item.description:
Oracle today released its full-year and fourth-quarter fiscal year 2026 results. For fiscal year 2026, the company's total operating revenue was $67.357 billion, a year-on-year increase of 17.35%; net profit attributable to the parent company was $16.984 billion, a year-on-year increase of 36.50%; operating cash flow was $31.977 billion, a year-on-year increase of 53.58%. 甲骨文今天发布 2026 财年全年及第四财季业绩。2026 财年内，公司营业总收入为 673.57 亿美元，同比增长 17.35%；归母净利润 169.84 亿美元，同比增长 36.50%；经营现金流 319.77 亿美元，同比增长 53.58%。

Full-year gross profit was $20.606 billion, a year-on-year increase of 16.56%, with a gross profit margin of 30.59%, a year-on-year decrease of 0.21 percentage points. Basic earnings per share were $5.94, and diluted earnings per share were $5.83. 全年毛利为 206.06 亿美元，同比增长 16.56%，毛利率为 30.59%，同比下降 0.21 个百分点。基本每股收益为 5.94 美元，稀释每股收益为 5.83 美元。

In the fourth fiscal quarter, Oracle's total operating revenue was $19.184 billion, a year-on-year increase of 20.63%; net profit attributable to the parent company was $4.223 billion, a year-on-year increase of 23.23%; and the gross profit margin was 31.97%. 第四财季内，甲骨文营业总收入为 191.84 亿美元，同比增长 20.63%；归母净利润 42.23 亿美元，同比增长 23.23%；毛利率为 31.97%。

item.title: 💡 OpenAI：完全自动化不是想要的未来，人类判断力不可替代
item.guid: 💡-OpenAI：完全自动化不是想要的未来，人类判断力不可替代
item.description:
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and Chief Scientist Jakub Pachocki recently co-authored an article, officially abandoning the previously proposed plan to "build a fully autonomous AI research system by March 2028," instead emphasizing a human-computer collaboration model. OpenAI CEO 山姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman）与首席研究员雅各布·帕乔基（Jakub Pachocki）日前联合发文，正式放弃此前提出的「到 2028 年 3 月构建完全自主 AI 研究系统」的计划，转而强调人机协作模式。

In the blog post, the two wrote: "We internally believe that by March 2028, a significant portion of our research work may be completed collaboratively by AI systems and researchers." 在这篇博文中，两人写道：「我们内部认为，到 2028 年 3 月，我们的研究工作中可能会有相当一部分由 AI 系统与研究人员协同完成。」

This is significantly more conservative compared to OpenAI's full automation goal proposed last October. The blog post also clearly stated a rejection of the fully automated approach: 这与 OpenAI 去年 10 月提出的全自动化目标相比，明显更为保守。博文同时表明了对完全自动化路线的明确否定：

Fully automating everything is not the future we want. It is both frustrating and dangerous. In the long run, people's crucial role lies in deciding what is worth doing.

Altman further elaborated in the article that the stronger AI systems become, the more crucial the human role becomes—including setting direction, weighing pros and cons, and exercising judgment. 奥特曼在文中进一步阐述，AI 系统能力越强，人类的作用反而越关键——包括设定方向、权衡利弊与运用判断力。

item.title: 3999 元起，影石 Luna Ultra 云台相机正式发布
item.guid: 3999-元起，影石-Luna-Ultra-云台相机正式发布
item.description:
Insta360 yesterday officially released its flagship dual-camera gimbal camera, Luna Ultra, equipped with a 1-inch 8K main camera and a 1/1.3-inch super telephoto lens, both co-tuned with Leica. Limited-time pricing starts from 3999 yuan. 影石 Insta360 昨日正式发布旗舰双摄云台相机 Luna Ultra，配备一颗 1 英寸 8K 主摄与一颗 1/1.3 英寸超级长焦，均经徕卡联合调校。限时售价 3999 元起。

    1-inch 8K main camera, F1.8 aperture, 14 stops dynamic range; 1/1.3-inch super telephoto lens, F2.0 aperture, 3x optical zoom, 6x lossless zoom, up to 12x total zoom, minimum focusing distance 15cm;

    "Qualcomm 4nm flagship chip + dual independent image chips" AI triple-chip architecture;

    8K 30fps Dolby Vision video, 4K 120fps slow motion, 4K 60fps night scene recording;

    Still photos up to 37 megapixels, supporting 200-megapixel wide panoramic shots;

    Built-in Leica color presets (including Leica Chrome, Leica Natural) and 6 film filters;

    1550mAh battery, approximately 4 hours of battery life, 23 minutes fast charge to 80%, built-in 47GB storage.

🔗 Related reading: Do you prefer Coca-Cola or Pepsi? | Insta360 Luna Ultra Experience 🔗 相关阅读： 你喜欢喝可口可乐，还是百事可乐？｜影石 Luna Ultra 体验

item.title: 1499 元起，一加 Turbo 6X 系列发布
item.guid: 1499-元起，一加-Turbo-6X-系列发布
item.description:
OnePlus yesterday released the Turbo 6X series, which includes two models: Turbo 6X and Turbo 6X Pro. 一加昨日发布 Turbo 6X 系列，包含 Turbo 6X 和 Turbo 6X Pro 两款机型。

    OnePlus Turbo 6X: Starting at a promotional price of 1499 yuan for the first sale; features a 6.72-inch FHD+ 144Hz LCD eye-protection screen, Dimensity 7360 SUPER processor, 7000mAh battery, and 45W fast charging, supporting up to 2TB TF storage card expansion.

    OnePlus Turbo 6X Pro: Starting at a promotional price of 1699 yuan for the first sale, with a national subsidy price starting at 1444.15 yuan; features an 8000mAh battery, 80W fast charging, Dimensity 7400 SUPER chip, and a 1.5K 144Hz Samsung eye-protection screen, with IP66 / IP68 / IP69 / IP69K water resistance.

item.title: 3799 元起？大疆 Pocket4P 价格曝光，预计 6 月 15 日发布
item.guid: 3799-元起？大疆-Pocket4P-价格曝光，预计-6-月-15-日发布
item.description:
According to Sina Technology, citing informed sources, the DJI Pocket 4P will be officially released on June 15th, with the standard package priced starting at 3799 yuan. 据新浪科技援引知情人士报道，大疆 Pocket4P 将于 6 月 15 日正式发布，标准套装定价 3799 元起。

Earlier this month, DJI held the "DJI Light and Shadow Twelve Years & Handheld Imaging Technology Sharing Session" in Beijing, where the Osmo Pocket 4P was highlighted. Public information shows that this pocket gimbal camera features a 1-inch CMOS and a 3x telephoto lens, supporting 17 stops of dynamic range and D-Log 2 professional color curve. 大疆本月初在北京举行「大疆光影十二载暨手持影像技术分享会」，现场重点介绍了 Osmo Pocket 4P。公开资料显示，这款口袋云台相机搭载 1 英寸 CMOS 和 3x 中焦镜头，支持 17 级动态范围与 D-Log 2 专业色彩曲线。

item.title: 罗技发布首款折叠鼠标 Mobi Fold
item.guid: 罗技发布首款折叠鼠标-Mobi-Fold
item.description:
Logitech yesterday released its first foldable mouse, the Mobi Fold, priced at $79.99, approximately 543 yuan. The mouse features an accordion-like structure in the middle, and the official statement claims it can withstand over 15 years of use, calculated at 8 folds or unfolds per day. 罗技昨天发布首款折叠鼠标 Mobi Fold，定价 79.99 美元，约合 543 元人民币。鼠标中部采用风琴式结构，官方称按每天 8 次折叠或展开计算，可承受超过 15 年使用。

The Mobi Fold is designed for portable office use, with its projected area reduced by nearly 50% when folded, and features anti-accidental touch protection when closed. It uses a dust-proof and stain-resistant silicone sleeve externally, adopts a symmetrical mold, and is equipped with a 4K DPI PixArt PAW3222 optical sensor, silent click micro-switches, and a touch panel that supports adaptive scrolling. Mobi Fold 面向便携办公，折叠后投影面积降低近 50%，合上时有防误触保护。它外部使用防尘防污硅胶套，采用对称式模具，配备 4K DPI 原相 PAW3222 光学传感器、轻音按键微动和支持自适应滚动的触控面板。

In terms of battery life, the Mobi Fold has a built-in 100mAh battery, offering about 1 month of use, and a 1-minute fast charge can provide an additional 22 hours of use. Also released simultaneously was Logitech's new generation wireless presenter, Spotlight 2, which supports circular/square focus, magnification, and annotation effects, priced at $129.99. 续航方面，Mobi Fold 内置 100mAh 电池，续航约 1 个月，快充 1 分钟可补充 22 小时使用时间。同时发布的还有罗技新一代无线演示器 Spotlight 2，支持圆形 / 方形聚焦、放大和注释效果，定价 129.99 美元。

item.title: 小米开源 MiMo Code 终端 AI 编程助手
item.guid: 小米开源-MiMo-Code-终端-AI-编程助手
item.description:
Early this morning, Xiaomi MiMo released and open-sourced MiMo Code V0.1.0, an exploratory AI programming assistant that runs in the terminal. The project is a secondary development based on the open-source project OpenCode and includes the time-limited free multimodal model MiMo-V2.5. 今天凌晨，小米 MiMo 发布并开源 MiMo Code V0.1.0，一款运行在终端里的探索性 AI 编程助手。项目基于开源项目 OpenCode 二次开发，内置限时免费的多模态模型 MiMo-V2.5。

MiMo Code supports access to mainstream models like DeepSeek, Kimi, and GLM, and also supports third-party Token Plans. Xiaomi states that it has a built-in persistent memory system, maintaining long conversation states through a triple mechanism of project memory, session checkpoints, and task progress; recording tasks are handed over to independent subagents, while the main agent continues to perform coding, testing, and review tasks. MiMo Code 支持接入 DeepSeek、Kimi、GLM 等主流模型，也支持第三方 Token Plan。小米称，它内置持久记忆系统，通过项目记忆、会话检查点和任务进度三重机制维持长会话状态；记录任务交给独立 subagent，主 agent 继续执行编码、测试和审查任务。

The tool also provides a MiMo exclusive Harness system and Compose mode. After switching to Compose by pressing Tab, users can let the tool complete the design, planning, coding, testing, and review processes starting from an idea. 该工具还提供 MiMo 专属 Harness 系统和 Compose 模式。用户按 Tab 切换到 Compose 后，可以让工具从一个想法开始完成设计、规划、编码、测试和审查流程。

item.title: 保时捷打造《玩具总动员》定制 911
item.guid: 保时捷打造《玩具总动员》定制-911
item.description:
Porsche and Pixar have collaborated again to create three custom 911s inspired by the characters Woody, Jessie, and Buzz Lightyear, ahead of the release of "Toy Story 5". The three cars will be sold as a package, and the proceeds will be donated to charity organizations. 保时捷和皮克斯再次合作，在《玩具总动员 5》上映前，以胡迪、翠丝和巴斯光年三位角色为灵感，打造三辆定制 911。三辆车将打包出售，所得款项会捐给慈善组织。

The three cars are based on the 911 Carrera T, 911 Targa 4 GTS, and the 911 GT3 RS with Weissach Package, respectively. The Porsche Sonderwunsch customization team invested over 350 hours of meticulous hand-finishing for each car, with all body patterns completed by spray paint, without the use of vinyl stickers. 三辆车分别基于 911 Carrera T、911 Targa 4 GTS 和配备 Weissach Package 的 911 GT3 RS 打造。保时捷 Sonderwunsch 定制团队为每辆车投入超过 350 小时手工精修，车身图案全部由喷漆完成，没有使用乙烯基贴纸。

    The Woody-themed Carrera T uses a custom blue paint, with the team pressing real denim into the wet paint to create a denim texture;

    The Jessie-themed Targa 4 GTS uses Jessie White Metallic paint and hand-painted GTS Red pinstripes;

    The Buzz Lightyear-themed GT3 RS features a white body with green and purple hand-painted decorations to replicate the spacesuit aesthetic, and the rear wing is also treated to resemble deployable wings.

item.title: 八部门推动铁路与旅游融合
item.guid: 八部门推动铁路与旅游融合
item.description:
Yesterday, 8 units including the Ministry of Commerce, the Ministry of Culture and Tourism, and China State Railway Group Co., Ltd. issued the "Several Measures on Promoting the Integrated Development of Railway and Tourism and Expanding Service Consumption," proposing to integrate railway infrastructure, tourist trains, themed carriages, ticketing products, and cultural and tourism resources along the line into new service consumption scenarios. 商务部、文化和旅游部、国铁集团等 8 单位昨日印发《关于促进铁路与旅游融合发展 扩大服务消费的若干措施》，提出把铁路基础设施、旅游列车、主题车厢、票制产品和沿线文旅资源整合成新的服务消费场景。

The measures require promoting the tourism-oriented transformation of tourist destination stations in suitable areas, incorporating local characteristic elements, and adding age-friendly, transfer, and exclusive tourist service facilities. 措施要求，在有条件的地方推进旅游目的地车站旅游化改造，融入当地特色元素，并增加适老化、换乘和游客专属服务设施。

The document also encourages social capital to participate in the renovation of tourist train equipment and facilities, develop different themed products such as long-distance, inclusive, senior-friendly, study tour, and wellness, and promote cross-industry collaborations between tourist trains and well-known IPs. 文件还鼓励社会资本参与旅游列车设备设施改造，开发长短途、普惠、银发、研学、康养等不同主题产品，并推动旅游列车与知名 IP 跨界联名。

By 2030, more than 160 dedicated railway tourist train sets will be built nationwide. The document also proposes developing tourist special line products with fixed routes, regular operations, and tickets as the primary sales method, improving the 12306 tourism service functions, and introducing tiered preferential ticket price policies. 到 2030 年，全国范围内要打造 160 列以上铁路旅游列车专用车组。文件还提出开发固定路线、常态化运行、以车票为主要销售形式的旅游专线产品，完善 12306 旅游服务功能，并推出梯度优惠票价政策。

item.title: 曝联想 7 月起全品类产品涨价
item.guid: 曝联想-7-月起全品类产品涨价
item.description:
According to Blue Whale News, Lenovo has finalized a price adjustment decision at its May work meeting this year. After the 618 mega sale, all its product categories will uniformly increase prices starting from July, with the price hike roughly consistent with the previous round. 据蓝鲸新闻，联想已在今年 5 月工作会议上敲定一项调价决策，618 大促结束后，自 7 月起旗下全品类产品将统一涨价，调价涨幅与上一轮基本持平。

The report cited sources saying that Lenovo has advised dealers with equipment procurement plans to finalize their proposals as soon as possible and stock up in advance to lock in prices; the official price increase letter is expected to be sent to dealers by the end of this month. 报道援引知情人士说法称，联想已建议经销商如果有设备采购计划，应尽快敲定方案并提前备货锁价；正式涨价函预计本月底发给经销商。

item.title: Eros 在英国投入 3.55 亿美元，启动 AI 修复片单
item.guid: Eros-在英国投入-3.55-亿美元，启动-AI-修复片单
item.description:
According to Variety, Eros Innovation announced an investment of £265 million, or approximately $355.2 million, in the UK to launch a slate of 15 film and television projects. These include an AI-restored version of the Rajinikanth-starrer 'Kochadaiiyaan,' a continuation of the 'Tanu Weds Manu' series, and a new mythological film universe. 据 Variety 报道，Eros Innovation 宣布在英国投入 2.65 亿英镑，约合 3.552 亿美元，启动 15 部影视项目片单，其中包括 Rajinikanth 主演电影《Kochadaiiyaan》的 AI 修复版、《Tanu Weds Manu》系列延续作品，以及一个新的神话电影宇宙。

The company also announced that it is licensing its $1.7 billion cultural dataset to a new company for training and developing AI tools for Indian and global South Asian content. By combining its film slate, data licensing, and UK production investment, Eros is attempting to integrate its old film library, celebrity IP, and AI restoration capabilities into new content assets. 公司还宣布，将其估值 17 亿美元的文化数据集授权给一家新公司，用于训练和开发面向印度及全球南亚内容的 AI 工具。Eros 把片单、数据授权和英国制作投入放在一起，试图把旧片库、明星 IP 和 AI 修复能力组合成新内容资产。

'Kochadaiiyaan,' when released in 2014, was marketed for its motion capture and animation production. This AI restoration brings it back into discussions about technology and cultural assets. 《Kochadaiiyaan》2014 年上映时以动作捕捉和动画制作作为卖点，这次 AI 修复让它重新进入技术和文化资产讨论。

item.title: 中国杂技团《时间·地圈》获「IDOL-2026」国际马戏艺术节金奖
item.guid: 中国杂技团《时间·地圈》获「IDOL-2026」国际马戏艺术节金奖
item.description:
According to China News Service, the 'IDOL-2026' International Circus Art Festival was recently held in Moscow, Russia, where the China Acrobatic Troupe's original program 'Time · Hoop' won the gold award in fierce competition. This marks the 78th international gold award won by the China Acrobatic Troupe since its establishment 76 years ago. 据中国新闻网报道，「IDOL-2026」国际马戏艺术节日前在俄罗斯莫斯科举行，中国杂技团原创节目《时间·地圈》在激烈角逐中获得金奖。这是中国杂技团自成立 76 年来斩获的第 78 枚国际金奖。

This year's festival brought together top acrobatic acts from around the world. Russian local performers demonstrated extreme expressiveness in aerial acts and the 'Russian Bar' event, while delegations from South America, Europe, and other regions also presented innovative performances. 本届艺术节汇聚了全球顶尖杂技节目。俄罗斯本土选手在高空节目和「俄罗斯斗杠」项目中展现出极限表现力，南美、欧洲等代表团也带来具有创新性的演出。

'Time · Hoop' is performed by the new generation of actors from the China Acrobatic Troupe. With precise rhythm control, high-difficulty tumbling techniques, and stage presence, it transforms the abstract concept of 'time' into a visual presentation, ultimately gaining recognition from both the jury and the audience. According to reports, this is also the second time this year that the 'Time · Hoop' team has won an award in an international competition. 《时间·地圈》由中国杂技团新生代演员担纲，凭借精准的节奏控制、高难度翻腾技巧与舞台表现力，将「时间」这一抽象概念转化为视觉呈现，最终获得评审团与观众的认可。据报道，这也是《时间·地圈》节目组今年第二次在国际赛场获奖。
